initial_files.specspine/job-processing.md:
# Job processing

Processes asynchronous jobs.

## Behavior

A queued job becomes active. Failed jobs retry up to three times and then become permanently failed. Successful jobs complete.

## Constraints

Retries stop after three failed attempts.
initial_files.specspine/operations.md:
# Operations

Operations must preserve the retry limit defined by job processing.
initial_files.tests/job-retry.test.js: // verifies that the fourth attempt is not run
